item.title: The AMS Buyer’s Toolkit: 4 On-Demand Webinars to Guide Your Decision
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Navigate the process of choosing the right AMS for your association with our compilation of expert-led, on-demand webinars.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Selecting the right AMS starts here.

Choosing the right Association Management Software (AMS) is a critical decision that impacts your association’s efficiency, member experience, and long-term success. To help you through the process, we’ve compiled four expert-led on-demand webinars designed for large and enterprise associations like yours.

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:62:"Insights into the latest AMS technology trends and innovations";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:63:"Expert guidance on selecting the right AMS for your association";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:67:"Key considerations for implementation, adoption, and maximizing ROI";}}

Ready to Make an Informed AMS Decision?

Access the full toolkit and get expert guidance—on your schedule.

AMS Buyer’s Toolkit: Webinar Decision Guide

item.title: Association Software Buyer's Guide
item.dc:creator: colleen.bernum@momentivestg.wpenginepowered.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Is your technology holding you back? Learn how to evaluate association software, win stakeholder buy-in, and ensure a seamless implementation.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Association Software Buyer’s Guide: Choose the Right AMS & Tech
See how Momentive replaces all your tools with one platform.
Discover how Momentive's solutions can help your organization achieve its goals.

Your members don’t see your back-office struggles, but they certainly feel them. They feel it in the clunky registration form, the irrelevant email blast, and the slow-loading resource page. At its heart, a technology upgrade isn’t about software—it’s about people.

It’s about freeing your staff from the manual data shuffle so they can focus on what they actually love: building a community that thrives.

This guide explores association technology that puts your members back at the center of your mission.
Fill out the form to access this toolkit

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>
<script>
  hbspt.forms.create({
    portalId: "46621835",
    formId: "7336ae62-9e80-4606-846c-2523cba6b43d",
    region: "na1"

</script>

a:9:{s:6:"item-0";a:12:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#ffffff";s:10:"section_id";s:32:"association-operation-priorities";s:13:"section_title";s:32:"Association Operation Priorities";s:19:"section_description";s:648:"

The complexities of running an association are at the forefront in this economic and political climate. As both members and non-members are more conscious of spending, it’s crucial for your association to provide top-line value to members, host valuable events and networking opportunities, and pursue innovative opportunities to grow non-dues revenue.

Technology impacts every aspect of association operations, but inefficient technology can also hold your organization back. So how do you know if your technology is right for your organization? The questions explore the most common operational challenges associations deal with.

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:21:"Unlock your resources";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:5:"#form";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_1_items";}s:6:"item-1";a:12:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#f7f7f7";s:10:"section_id";s:21:"is-it-time-to-upgrade";s:13:"section_title";s:22:"Is it time to upgrade?";s:19:"section_description";s:348:"

If your team is juggling multiple systems, reliant on manual entry, fighting back declining member engagement, or looking for ways to increase efficiency, your technology is key. When considering an upgrade, your team should be at the heart of the process.

Ask these questions to figure out if it’s time to upgrade your tech:

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:21:"Unlock your resources";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:5:"#form";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_2_items";}s:6:"item-2";a:12:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#ffffff";s:10:"section_id";s:30:"association-software-explained";s:13:"section_title";s:30:"Association Software Explained";s:19:"section_description";s:154:"

These are the most common areas where associations experience operational pain points, along with how the software will benefit your organization.

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:21:"Explore AMS Solutions";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:43:"/solutions/association-management-software/";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:4:"true";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_3_items";}s:6:"item-3";a:12:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#f7f7f7";s:10:"section_id";s:21:"operational-solutions";s:13:"section_title";s:21:"Operational Solutions";s:19:"section_description";s:0:"";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_4_items";}s:6:"item-4";a:12:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:8:"carousel";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#ffffff";s:10:"section_id";s:21:"explore-our-solutions";s:13:"section_title";s:21:"Explore our Solutions";s:19:"section_description";s:0:"";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:0:"";}s:6:"item-5";a:12:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:8:"standard";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#ffffff";s:10:"section_id";s:35:"association-software-for-every-need";s:13:"section_title";s:35:"Association Software for Every Need";s:19:"section_description";s:865:"

Every organization’s journey is different, and your technology should reflect your unique scale and complexity. Momentive Software provides a range of platforms tailored to where you are today, and where you’re going tomorrow:

  • Small and Nano Associations: Focused on all-in-one simplicity to help small staffs automate everything from renewals to event registration in one place.
  • Mid-Market and Growing Associations: Designed for organizations that need robust financial tools and deeper member insights without the overhead of a massive IT department.
  • Enterprise and Large Associations: Built for high-complexity organizations that require native integration with Salesforce or Microsoft Dynamics, global multi-currency support, and AI-driven predictive modeling.
";s:13:"section_image";s:109:"https://momentivesoftware.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Association-Buyers-Guide-Software-for-Every-Need.png";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:0:"";}s:6:"item-6";a:12:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#f7f7f7";s:10:"section_id";s:27:"finding-a-technology-vendor";s:13:"section_title";s:27:"Finding a Technology Vendor";s:19:"section_description";s:302:"

The most important step in the entire process is finding the right technology vendor. Your association needs a vendor that partners with it from the buying phase to implementation and day-to-day support. If you’re ready to upgrade, use these tips to evaluate potential solutions and partners.

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:4:"true";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_5_items";}s:6:"item-7";a:12:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#ffffff";s:10:"section_id";s:27:"getting-stake-holder-buy-in";s:13:"section_title";s:26:"Getting Stakeholder Buy-in";s:19:"section_description";s:535:"

Once you’ve selected a vendor and are ready to begin the process, there’s one last hurdle to clear before you can officially start the process: getting stakeholder buy-in.

Getting everyone on board can be one of the most difficult parts. Securing support from your stakeholders, whether they’re board members, staff, or even association members, can make or break the success of your implementation. Here's how to build a compelling case for tech adoption, address concerns, and ultimately get the buy-in you need.

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_6_items";}s:6:"item-8";a:12:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#f7f7f7";s:10:"section_id";s:14:"the-next-steps";s:13:"section_title";s:14:"The Next Steps";s:19:"section_description";s:79:"

After securing board approval, it’s time to move the process forward.

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_7_items";}}

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:36:"Do we have a time-intensive process?";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:499:"

Separate pieces of technology slow down efficiency and contribute to burnout. Research found that 8 in 10 nonprofit and association professionals agree that inefficient or disconnected technology systems contribute to burnout.

If your association is uses separate tech for processes like email marketing, event registration, payment processing, and more, the result is tons of manual work that’s time-consuming and error-prone.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:26:"sol-fundraising-management";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:11:"fundraising";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:51:"Is our team consistently manually transferring data";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:355:"

If your team is manually transferring data between systems, updating spreadsheets constantly, or even having to manually check a member’s status, they’re wasting time with inefficient processes. The time spent sorting through these inefficiencies can be better spent on strategic activities focused on member value or growing non-dues revenue.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-2";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:39:"Do we have declining member engagement?";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:987:"

In an environment where associations need to prioritize member value above all else, your technology can make or break you. If you’re noticing a drop in event attendance, fewer renewals, or less interaction with your communications, it’s time to upgrade.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}}
2026 Talent Retention Report for the Mission-Driven Workforce
Learn more about Momentive Software Association solutions.
Need more help with the buying process? Fill out the form to unlock exclusive association technology resources.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:53:"Ask for and encourage candid feedback from your team.";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:451:"

Too often, associations stick with what’s working because it’s worked before. Just because you’re using the technology doesn’t mean it’s the best option available today. Ask your team questions about the software, like:

  • What are the benefits?
  • What are the drawbacks?
  • What does support look like?
  • Is the software regularly updated?
  • Does the software feature cross-compatibility?
";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:42:"Aggregate key takeaways from the feedback.";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:176:"

After compiling all the feedback from your team, common themes will emerge and become more apparent. The challenges, in particular, will influence your go-forward plan.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-2";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:52:"Identify what you’re hoping an upgrade will solve.";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:364:"

Solving inefficiencies your team is working through not only helps them do their job better but also increases the effectiveness of your entire organization. Consolidating multiple, disparate systems or implementing a new multifaceted tech ecosystem will solve many of the common themes you aggregated above.

 

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:4:"true";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:12:"cb-dark-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:41:"What Kind of Platform Do You Really Need?";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:13:"Take our Quiz";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:55:"/interactive-tools/membership-management-software-quiz/";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-3";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:28:"Determine a go-forward plan.";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:528:"

After your evaluation, it’s time to determine your go-forward plan. Here, you’ll have your company’s technology mapped out, along with the feedback from your team, and you’ll decide what your next steps are going to be.

Whether that means sunsetting inefficient systems or looking for new vendors entirely, this process will take time, but the benefits are undeniable. Sunsetting dated systems saves costs related to technology upkeep and improves efficiency by eliminating siloed, single-purpose systems.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}}

a:5:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:37:"Association Management Software (AMS)";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:473:"

When your operations are powered by a centralized solution, you move beyond the manual workaround phase and into true organizational health. By establishing a single source of truth for all member and constituent data, you eliminate the disconnected technology that contributes to burnout. 

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:4:"true";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:19:"How it Benefits You";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:287:"

By consolidating marketing, registration, and renewals into one high-performance environment, your team gains a 360-degree view of activity without ever having to manually sync a spreadsheet. It allows you to automate the routine, so your staff can focus on the mission-critical.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:9:"Start Now";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:241:"

If you're reading this guide, that means something prompted you to start thinking about making a switch. Finding a new platform and implementing it can take time, so don't wait until you have six months left on your current contract.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-2";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:14:"Spend the Time";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:505:"

This is a huge decision, and you're going to use your new solution for many years. Don't shortcut the process. Take the time to meet with vendors and peers, and do your research on the products.

You are not the first organization to tackle this, so don't go it alone. Networking and vendor-provider references can be hugely beneficial. Find organizations similar to yours and reach out to them to learn which solutions they use. You'd be surprised how generous they will be with their time.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-2";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-2";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:24:"Don't Be Afraid to Share";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:284:"

The more information you provide potential providers, the better your outcome will be. Show them what they ask to see and use them as a resource. We've all been in the industry for a long time, and we are generally very generous with our time as we work to earn your business.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-2";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-3";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:48:"Focus on the Right Partner and the Best Software";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:418:"

It's critical that the solution you select meets your requirements, but finding the right partner that is the right cultural fit for your organization is often more important than the actual software.

Finding a partner who prioritizes your members' experience is key, which is why Momentive Software centers its entire ecosystem on driving engagement and maximizing value for associations of every size.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:39:"Identify Your Champions and Influencers";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:515:"

Before you can build support, you need to know whose "yes" matters most. Each group has different motivations:

  • Board and Executive Leadership: They care about ROI, long-term growth, and strategic alignment.
  • Staff: They care about daily efficiency, reducing "burnout" (Box 1), and ending the cycle of manual data entry.
  • Members: They care about a seamless, personalized experience and the value they get for their dues.
";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:32:"Build a Compelling Business Case";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:647:"

Don’t just talk about features—talk about solutions. A strong business case connects the new software to your association’s long-term vision.

  • Quantify the Inefficiency: Show the cost of doing nothing. Calculate how many hours are currently wasted on manual transfers and how that time could be better spent on member-facing initiatives.
  • Focus on Strategic Growth: Explain how modernizing your tech stack, whether it’s a new AMS, LMS, or an AI layer like MomentiveIQ, directly supports your goal of increasing non-dues revenue and retention.
";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:4:"true";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:12:"cb-dark-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:294:"

Watch now to discover best practices, frameworks, and real-world examples to help you build leadership buy-in, ensure long-term stability, and make confident, future-ready tech decisions.

";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-2";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:30:"Communicate Through Their Lens";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:477:"

Tailor your messaging so it resonates with each specific group. For your board, highlight how centralized data and real-time analytics lead to smarter, faster decision-making. For staff, emphasize the quality of life improvements. Show them how automated workflows will take the repetitive, error-prone tasks off their plates. For members, frame the upgrade as an investment in their experience—better networking, easier event registration, and more relevant content.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-3";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:30:"Address the Fear of Disruption";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:647:"

Head-On Change can be intimidating. To ease budget and operational concerns:

  • Break Down the Total Cost of Ownership (TCO): Compare the upfront investment with the long-term savings in staff time and the sunsetting of dated, siloed systems.
  • Proposed Phased Implementation: You don't have to do everything at once. Spreading the rollout over time makes the transition financially and operationally manageable.
  • Offer a Support Roadmap: Clearly outline the training and help-desk resources available to ensure no one is left behind during the transition.
";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:4:"true";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:12:"cb-dark-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:13:"Here's a Tip:";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:424:"

One of your best tools is something you already have done! Use staff feedback to highlight the benefits and drawbacks of the current software in your conversations. Even involve key team members in presentations to your board and association members.

When stakeholders feel their candid feedback has influenced the go-forward plan, they are much more likely to champion the final result rather than resist it.

";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}}

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:37:"Contract Finalization and Procurement";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:415:"

Before a single line of data is moved, you have to dot the i's and cross the t's.

Your legal team will review the Master Service Agreement (MSA) and Statement of Work (SOW). Your IT team will conduct a final security and compliance check to ensure the software meets data privacy standards.

Signature and Scheduling: Once signed, you’ll secure your spot in the vendor's implementation queue.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:33:"Project Kickoff and Team Assembly";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:414:"

This is where the partnership begins. You’ll be introduced to your dedicated implementation team from the vendor side.

You’ll appoint a project lead and super users from various departments, such as events, finance, and membership to work with your vendor’s implementation team.

You’ll set a formal project timeline, establish milestones, and agree on what go-live success looks like.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-2";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:14:"Implementation";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:633:"

Our professional services team acts as a strategic guide throughout this transition, managing the heavy lifting of data migration and system configuration to ensure your new platform is ready for use on day one.

By providing personalized, expert-led training and tailored project management, they help your staff move past the fear of the unknown and avoid the burnout often associated with manual data cleanup. This hands-on approach ensures that your technology is not just installed but fully optimized, eliminating the disparate systems and manual processes that previously hindered your organization's efficiency.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-3";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:20:"Support and Training";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:271:"

After you go live, our training and support teams continue to support your organization, ensuring that whenever a need arises, your organization is supported.

Learn more about Momentive Software support.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}}

item.title: Association Buyer's Guide Software for Every Need
item.dc:creator: colleen.bernum@momentivestg.wpenginepowered.com

item.title: Nonprofit Software Buyer’s Guide
item.dc:creator: colleen.bernum@momentivestg.wpenginepowered.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Is your technology holding you back? Learn how to evaluate nonprofit software, win stakeholder buy-in, and ensure a seamless implementation.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Nonprofit Software Buyer’s Guide: Choose the Right Tech

For a nonprofit, technology is not just a utility; it is a megaphone for your cause. When your digital tools are outdated, the friction is felt by the people who matter most: the donor who wants to give quickly, the volunteer looking for a meaningful role, and the beneficiaries waiting for services.

A modern tech stack should be invisible and effective, allowing your mission to take center stage. This guide is designed to help you move beyond keeping the lights on so you can focus on scaling your impact and deepening your community’s trust.
Fill out the form to access this toolkit

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>

a:8:{s:6:"item-0";a:11:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#ffffff";s:13:"section_title";s:30:"Nonprofit Operation Priorities";s:19:"section_description";s:449:"

In this economic and political climate, every dollar matters for nonprofits. As your organization works to maximize its mission, your technology should help your team do more.

Your team can’t function without technology, but inefficient tech can also hold your organization back. So how do you know if your technology is right for your organization? The questions explore the most common operational challenges that nonprofits face.

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:21:"Unlock your resources";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:5:"#form";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_1_items";}s:6:"item-1";a:11:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#f7f7f7";s:13:"section_title";s:22:"Is it time to upgrade?";s:19:"section_description";s:338:"

If your team is juggling multiple systems, reliant on manual entry, fighting back declining donor figures, or looking for ways to increase efficiency, your technology is key. When considering an upgrade, your team should be at the heart of the process.

Ask these questions to figure out if it’s time to upgrade your tech:

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:21:"Unlock your resources";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:5:"#form";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_2_items";}s:6:"item-2";a:11:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#ffffff";s:13:"section_title";s:28:"Nonprofit Software Explained";s:19:"section_description";s:152:"

These are the most common areas where nonprofits experience operational pain points, along with how the software will benefit your organization.

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_3_items";}s:6:"item-3";a:11:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#f7f7f7";s:13:"section_title";s:27:"Nonprofit Value-Added Tools";s:19:"section_description";s:0:"";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_4_items";}s:6:"item-4";a:11:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:8:"carousel";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#ffffff";s:13:"section_title";s:36:"Explore Momentive Software Solutions";s:19:"section_description";s:0:"";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:0:"";}s:6:"item-5";a:11:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#f7f7f7";s:13:"section_title";s:27:"Finding a Technology Vendor";s:19:"section_description";s:594:"

Every nonprofit’s journey is unique, and your technology should reflect your specific scale, mission, and complexity. Momentive Software provides a range of platforms tailored to where you are today and where your impact is headed tomorrow.

The most important step in this process is identifying a technology partner rather than just a software provider. Your nonprofit needs a vendor that stands beside you from the initial evaluation through implementation and ongoing daily support. If you are ready to modernize, use these tips to evaluate potential solutions and partners:

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:37:"Unlock Nonprofit Technology Resources";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:5:"#form";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_5_items";}s:6:"item-6";a:11:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#ffffff";s:13:"section_title";s:27:"Securing Stakeholder Buy-In";s:19:"section_description";s:304:"

Once you have selected a vendor, you must clear one final hurdle: getting everyone on board. Securing support from your board, staff, and donors can make or break your implementation.

Here is how to build a compelling case for adoption and address concerns before they stall your progress:

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_6_items";}s:6:"item-7";a:11:{s:14:"enable_section";s:4:"true";s:12:"section_type";s:9:"accordion";s:16:"section_bg_color";s:7:"#f7f7f7";s:13:"section_title";s:14:"The Next Steps";s:19:"section_description";s:79:"

After securing board approval, it’s time to move the process forward.

";s:13:"section_image";s:0:"";s:23:"section_cta_button_text";s:0:"";s:22:"section_cta_button_url";s:0:"";s:19:"section_cta_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:13:"carousel_type";s:9:"solutions";s:16:"linked_accordion";s:17:"accordion_7_items";}}
Need more help with the buying process?
Fill out the form to unlock exclusive nonprofit technology resources.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:36:"Do we have a time-intensive process?";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:552:"

Separate pieces of technology slow down efficiency and contribute to burnout. Research found that 8 in 10 nonprofit and association professionals agree that inefficient or disconnected technology systems contribute to burnout.

If your nonprofit uses separate tech for processes like email marketing, donor engagement, payment processing, and more, the result is tons of manual work that’s time-consuming and error-prone.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:51:"Is our team consistently manually transferring data";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:363:"

If your team is manually transferring data between systems, updating spreadsheets constantly, or even manually check a donor’s status, they’re wasting time with inefficient processes. The time spent sorting through these inefficiencies can be better spent on strategic activities focused on meeting your mission or engaging with external stakeholders.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-2";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-2";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:41:"Do we have personalized donor engagement?";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:267:"

Are you treating your $25-a-month recurring donor the same as a first-time gala attendee? If your software cannot segment your audience or track their unique history with your organization, you are losing the personal connection that drives long-term loyalty.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-2";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-3";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:35:"Can we fully see into our finances?";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:251:"

Stakeholders demand to see where their money goes. If it takes your team three days to pull a report on program outcomes or financial allocation, your technology is a barrier to the level of transparency needed in today’s economic landscape.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}}

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:53:"Ask for and encourage candid feedback from your team.";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:449:"

Too often, nonprofits stick with what’s working because it’s worked before. Just because you’re using the technology doesn’t mean it’s the best option available today. Ask your team questions about the software, like:

  • What are the benefits?
  • What are the drawbacks?
  • What does support look like?
  • Is the software regularly updated?
  • Does the software feature cross-compatibility?
";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:42:"Aggregate key takeaways from the feedback.";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:159:"

After compiling all of your team’s feedback , common themes will emerge and become more apparent. The challenges will influence your go-forward plan.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-2";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:52:"Identify what you’re hoping an upgrade will solve.";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:316:"

Solving inefficiencies your team is working through not only helps them do their job better but also increases the effectiveness of your entire organization. Consolidating multiple, disparate systems or implementing a new multifaceted tech ecosystem will solve many of the common themes you aggregated above.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-3";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:28:"Determine a go-forward plan.";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:531:"

After your evaluation, it’s time to determine your go-forward plan. Here, you’ll have your organization's technology mapped out, along with the feedback from your team, and you’ll decide what your next steps are going to be.

Whether that means sunsetting inefficient systems or looking for new vendors entirely, this process will take time, but the benefits are undeniable. Sunsetting dated systems saves costs related to technology upkeep and improves efficiency by eliminating siloed, single-purpose systems.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}}

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:25:"AI and Advanced Analytics";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:249:"

AI-powered tools unify your entire technology ecosystem, going beyond traditional Data Analytics and transforming fragmented data into an intelligent, automated experience. 

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:4:"true";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:19:"How it Benefits You";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:317:"

An AI and advanced analytics hub provides real-time, visual dashboards that eliminate the need for manual data sorting, allowing your team to focus on operational impact. Plus, AI Agents automate workflows and user interactions to help your organization realize time savings.

";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:20:"Explore AI Solutions";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:42:"https://momentivesoftware.com/momentiveiq/";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:5:"icons";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:15:"sol-MomentiveIQ";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:48:"Fund Accounting and Integrated Financial Systems";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:381:"

Generic business accounting tools don’t capture the nuances of nonprofit finances, such as restricted grant tracking or multi-year pledge management. Fund accounting software bridges this gap by integrating directly with your donor database to provide an audit-ready view of your organizational health. 

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:4:"true";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:19:"How it Benefits You";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:1266:"

Fund accounting software effortlessly tracks multiple funding sources including grants, individual donations, and fundraisers. This seamless data integration eliminates the need for manual reconciliation and provides an audit-ready source of truth,dramatically reducing human error. With real-time visibility into program spending and automated reporting, your leadership can make data-driven decisions that ensure total financial transparency and compliance for your stakeholders and board members.

To grow your mission, you need a sophisticated engine that moves beyond simple donation forms. Fundraising software unifies donor history, digital engagement, and communication preferences into a single source of truth.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:4:"true";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:19:"How it Benefits You";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:363:"

By connecting a supporter's giving history with their volunteer activity and event attendance, your development team can deliver hyper-personalized outreach. This whole-person view has been proven to improve donor retention by creating a seamless experience that transforms one-time donors into lifelong mission partners.

";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:29:"Explore Fundraising Solutions";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:61:"https://momentivesoftware.com/solutions/fundraising-software/";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:5:"icons";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:26:"sol-fundraising-management";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:11:"fundraising";}s:6:"item-3";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:26:"Volunteer Management Tools";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:467:"

The heartbeat of many nonprofits is the energy of volunteers, yet manual coordination often leads to scheduling conflicts and burnout. Centralizing recruitment, onboarding, and shift management into a digital ecosystem removes the administrative hurdles that stand between your supporters and their impact.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:4:"true";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:19:"How it Benefits You";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:334:"

Automation takes the guesswork out of coordination by sending real-time reminders and providing self-service portals. This reduces no-show rates and allows your volunteer manager to focus on nurturing relationships rather than managing complex spreadsheets.

From gala fundraisers to community awareness workshops, mission-critical events require a platform that handles the complexities of modern ticketing, mobile bidding, and hybrid logistics.
