";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:24:"Explore Career Solutions";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:64:"https://momentivesoftware.com/solutions/career-centers-software/";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:5:"icons";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:26:"sol-productcareer-services";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:7:"careers";}}

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:9:"Start Now";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:1024:"

If you are reading this guide, it means a specific challenge has prompted you to consider a switch. Finding a new platform and successfully migrating your data takes time and careful planning.  

Do not wait until your current contract is months away from expiring; give your team the breathing room to make a strategic choice without the pressure of a looming deadline. 

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-2";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:15:"Invest the Time";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:544:"

This is a foundational decision that will influence how you engage with donors and volunteers for years to come. Take the time to meet with vendors, attend demonstrations, and perform deep research on product capabilities.

You are not the first organization to navigate this transition, so lean on the nonprofit community. Networking with peers and requesting vendor references can be incredibly helpful. Reach out to organizations with similar missions or donor bases to learn which solutions actually deliver on their promises.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-2";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-2";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:30:"Be Transparent with Your Needs";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:790:"

The more context you provide to potential providers about your pain points and goals, the better your final outcome will be. Share your internal workflows and be open about your must-have features. As long-term members of the nonprofit technology industry, we are generally very generous with our time and expertise as we work to earn your trust and business.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-2";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-3";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:39:"Prioritize Partnership and Cultural Fit";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:756:"

It is critical that the software meets your technical requirements, but finding a partner that aligns with your organization’s culture is often more important than a specific feature list. You need a partner who understands that every digital interaction is an opportunity to deepen a donor's commitment. Momentive Software centers its entire ecosystem on driving engagement and maximizing impact for nonprofits of every size. 

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-2";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"standard";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}}

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:23:"Identify Your Champions";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:548:"

Before you can build support, you need to know whose approval matters most. Each group has different motivations:

  • Board and Executive Leadership: They prioritize return on investment, long-term sustainability, and strategic alignment.
  • Staff: They care about daily efficiency, reducing burnout, and ending the cycle of manual data entry.
  • Donors: They want a seamless, personalized experience and clear visibility into the impact of their contributions.
";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:32:"Build a Compelling Business Case";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:558:"

Do not just talk about features; talk about solutions. A strong business case connects the new software to your nonprofit’s long-term vision.

  • Quantify the Inefficiency: Show the cost of doing nothing. Calculate the hours wasted on manual data transfers and how that time could be better spent on mission-facing initiatives.
  • Focus on Strategic Growth: Explain how modernizing your tech stack directly supports your goal of increasing donor retention and growing diverse revenue streams.
";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-2";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:29:"Communicate with Each Segment";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:429:"

Tailor your messaging to resonate with each group.

  • For your board, highlight how centralized data leads to smarter decision-making.
  • For staff, emphasize quality-of-life improvements through automated workflows.
  • For donors, frame the upgrade as an investment in their experience, offering better engagement and more relevant content.
";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-3";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:30:"Address the Fear of Disruption";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:616:"

Change can be intimidating. To ease budget and operational concerns, take these steps:

  • Break Down the Total Cost of Ownership: Compare the upfront investment with the long-term savings gained from sunsetting dated, siloed systems.
  • Propose a Phased Implementation: You do not have to do everything at once. Spreading the rollout over time makes the transition operationally manageable.
  • Offer a Support Roadmap: Outline the training and help-desk resources available to ensure no one is left behind during the transition.
";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:4:"true";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:12:"cb-dark-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:619:"

Use the staff feedback you have already collected to highlight the drawbacks of your current software. When stakeholders feel their candid feedback has influenced the go-forward plan, they are much more likely to champion the final result. 

Watch Boardroom Ready: Building a Business Case for Tech Investment for more tips on earning external stakeholder buy-in.

";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:9:"Watch Now";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:84:"https://momentivesoftware.com/webinars/building-a-business-case-for-tech-investment/";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}}

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:37:"Contract Finalization and Procurement";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:425:"

Before a single line of data is moved, you have to dot the i's and cross the t's. Your legal team will review the Master Service Agreement (MSA) and Statement of Work (SOW). Your IT team will conduct a final security and compliance check to ensure the software meets data privacy standards.

Signature and Scheduling: Once signed, you’ll secure your spot in the vendor's implementation queue.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-1";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:33:"Project Kickoff and Team Assembly";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:416:"

This is where the partnership begins. You’ll be introduced to your dedicated implementation team from the vendor side.

You’ll appoint a project lead and super users from various departments, such as events, finance, and fundraising, to work with your vendor’s implementation team.

You’ll set a formal project timeline, establish milestones, and agree on what go-live success looks like.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-2";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:14:"Implementation";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:633:"

Our professional services team acts as a strategic guide throughout this transition, managing the heavy lifting of data migration and system configuration to ensure your new platform is ready for use on day one.

By providing personalized, expert-led training and tailored project management, they help your staff move past the fear of the unknown and avoid the burnout often associated with manual data cleanup. This hands-on approach ensures that your technology is not just installed but fully optimized, eliminating the disparate systems and manual processes that previously hindered your organization's efficiency.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:0:"";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:0:"";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:0:"";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}s:6:"item-3";a:24:{s:20:"accordion_item_title";s:20:"Support and Training";s:26:"accordion_item_description";s:166:"

After you go live, our training and support teams continue to support your organization, ensuring that whenever a need arises, your organization is supported.

";s:20:"accordion_item_width";s:9:"acc-col-1";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_bl";s:4:"true";s:22:"accordion_item_bl_text";s:47:"Learn more about Momentive Software’s support";s:21:"accordion_item_bl_url";s:38:"https://momentivesoftware.com/support/";s:25:"accordion_item_bl_new_tab";s:5:"false";s:24:"accordion_item_bl_2_text";s:57:"Learn more about Momentive Software’s training services";s:23:"accordion_item_bl_2_url";s:33:"https://www.communitybrandsu.com/";s:27:"accordion_item_bl_2_new_tab";s:4:"true";s:24:"accordion_item_enable_cb";s:5:"false";s:22:"accordion_item_cb_type";s:13:"cb-light-blue";s:23:"accordion_item_cb_title";s:0:"";s:29:"accordion_item_cb_description";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_cb_link_text";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_cb_link_url";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_cb_link_style";s:6:"button";s:20:"accordion_title_type";s:8:"numbered";s:24:"accordion_item_icon_type";s:20:"iconpicker-solutions";s:29:"accordion_item_icon_solutions";s:0:"";s:28:"accordion_item_icon_boxicons";s:0:"";s:27:"accordion_item_product_logo";s:0:"";s:26:"accordion_item_icon_custom";s:0:"";s:10:"icon_color";s:2:"ms";}}

item.title: Union Management Software Request for Proposal (RFP) Template and System Matrix
item.dc:creator: meera.parmar@momentivestg.wpenginepowered.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Download a free Union RFP Template and Matrix to simplify your selection process for new union membership software. Designed for large labor organizations.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Download a free Union RFP Template and Matrix to simplify your selection process for new union membership software. Designed for large labor organizations.

Acquire the resources necessary to streamline your search for a modern union membership management platform. This Union RFP Template was designed specifically for large labor organizations and offers a comprehensive framework for identifying the ideal software solution for your needs. 

Customize or adjust these materials to align with the unique requirements of your organization. Each file contains clear guidance on how to implement them and share them with your preferred membership management system vendors.  

Complete the form to access the template and the supporting RFP Matrix to begin your evaluation process today.

item.title: Membership Management Software Request for Proposal (RFP) Template and System Matrix
item.dc:creator: meera.parmar@momentivestg.wpenginepowered.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Download a free RFP template & requirements matrix to simplify your membership software evaluation & find the right AMS vendor.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
As you evaluate modern solutions for your association, Momentive Software has the resources needed to simplify the membership software RFP process.  

This RFP Template serves as a professional starting point to help you identify the technology that best supports your mission. 

 These documents are fully customizable, allowing you to modify or remove sections to ensure they align with your specific organizational requirements. Detailed instructions are included within the files to help you manage the process and share your criteria with your chosen membership management system vendors. 

Complete the form to download the RFP template and the integrated requirements matrix to begin your search today.

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>
<script>

    portalId: "46621835",
    formId: "826f4f02-f878-487f-8dac-d9095640f245",

  });

item.title: Workforce Retention Toolkit for Nonprofits & Associations
item.dc:creator: soniya.bajoria@communitybrands.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Access on-demand retention webinars & 2026 Retention Report. Get strategies to reduce churn, grow membership & build donor loyalty.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Build a stronger, more stable workforce—so your mission can thrive. 

Retention challenges aren’t just an HR issue. For nonprofits and associations, staff turnover directly affects member engagement, donor trust, volunteer continuity, and long‑term mission impact. 

The Workforce Retention Toolkit for Nonprofits & Associations brings together expert insights and research to help mission‑driven organizations understand today’s workforce realities and take practical steps to retain their people. 

This free toolkit includes four on‑demand thought‑leadership webinars and one in‑depth industry report, giving you both strategic context and actionable guidance you can apply right away.

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:107:"Executive insights into the key drivers of workforce retention shaping nonprofits and associations in 2026 ";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:98:"Proven people strategies that fuel engagement, performance, and sustainable organizational growth ";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:117:"Real‑world lessons from nonprofits and associations that have strengthened staff, member, and supporter retention ";}}
